mapper.insert: INSERT INTO skill_like (skill_id, user_id, created_at) VALUES (#{skillId}, #{userId}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, skill_id, user_id, created_at FROM skill_like WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND skill_id = #{skillId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM skill_like WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND skill_id = #{skillId}
